case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A. VS. RACHEL TRUEBA et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT TRUEBA, RACHEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-16-2011

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $393.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $450.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TRUEBA, RACHEL
